What Indigenous business programs are available?

Which industries get funding in the Territories?

Natural Resources

Mining, oil and gas services, renewable energy

Tourism & Culture

Aurora viewing, Indigenous tourism, adventure travel

Community Services

Essential services, construction, logistics

Traditional Economy

Arts and crafts, harvesting, cultural enterprises

IT & Remote Work

Telecom, IT services, remote knowledge work

Film & Media

Production services, northern content creation

What if I don't qualify for Territories grants?

shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Territories business grants. Access NWT Business Development, Yukon Small Business Support, Nunavut Economic Development, and Indigenous Business Programs. Funding available: up to $125M+.
shortAnswerQuestion: What small business grants are available in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Territories Small Business Grants  | + NT, YT, Nunavut Combined Funding in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Territories Small Business Grants  | + NT, YT, Nunavut Combined Funding?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $125M.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Lower Competition Edge
expertTip.content: Territorial programs have 85%+ approval rates due to lower application volumes and government priority on Northern economic development.

seo.metaTitle: Territories Small Business Grants 2026: Get Up to $125M+
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to qualify and apply for Territories Small Business Grants in 2026. Access up to $125M+ in non-dilutive funding. See if you qualify.
